summary: Iteration 103: Dashboard Stats Operator Filter feature verified. The useRealDashboardData hook now accepts operatorId as 3rd parameter and passes it to the API. All 9 management pages pass scopeOperatorId to the hook. When admin selects an operator in scope filter, Dashboard tab re-fetches with that operator_id and displays filtered stats.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render

critical_code_review_comments: Backend: /api/management/dashboard-stats correctly accepts operator_id query param (line 36)
Backend: resolved_operator_id logic correctly handles admin vs operator roles (lines 48-52)
Frontend: useRealDashboardData hook accepts operatorId as 3rd param (line 11)
Frontend: Hook includes operator_id in API call when provided (line 28-29)
Frontend: All 9 management pages pass scopeOperatorId to useRealDashboardData

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Dashboard operator filter verified on Travel Management page

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard operator filter feature verified. When admin selects operator from scope filter, Dashboard tab stats are filtered. All Operators shows: Routes=13, Bookings=3. Musango only shows: Routes=2, Bookings=0. Known operators: Musango Bus Service (30c487d8-f8ef-4e80-8b14-1a68866071c8), Oryno Travel & Hospitality, West Region Tours.

endpoints_tested: Different service types (hotels, travel, restaurants, car_rental) work correctly
Operator user gets own data only (operator_id param ignored for operator role)
Empty operator_id returns all data (same as no filter)

features: Hook passes operator_id to API when provided
All 9 management pages pass scopeOperatorId to hook
Operator scope filter shows 'All Operators (3)' dropdown
Selecting Musango Bus Service filters Dashboard stats
Stats change from 13 routes to 2 routes when Musango selected
Filter button shows selected operator name

playwright_test_results.operator_scope_filter: SUCCESS - 'All Operators (3)' dropdown visible with 3 operators
playwright_test_results.filter_verification: SUCCESS - Stats changed from 13 to 2 routes after filtering
